session.user:
Run ruff check on these specific files and report results: - src/erk/core/fast_llm.py - src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py - src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py
Working directory: /home/runner/work/erk/erk
Run: uv run ruff check src/erk/core/fast_llm.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py
session.assistant: I'll run ruff check on those three specific files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/core/fast_llm.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py
Run ruff check on three specific files

session.assistant:
**Result: ruff check passed**
All three files pass ruff checks with no violations: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/core/fast_llm.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py`
